sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86424" key="proagoreutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προᾰγορ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n86424.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prophetic,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φωνή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν μελλόντων</foreign> Chrysipp. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1322.tlg001:4:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.40</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κινδύνων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.66</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the art of divination,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
